project_type: Python Streamlit multi-page data analysis application
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, no Makefile or build script
test_framework: No test infrastructure exists - validation via streamlit run and python import checks
test_command: python -c "import app; import utils.data_generator; import utils.visualizations; import utils.ai_insights"
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -r requirements.txt  2. python -c to import all modules  3. Confirm no import errors or syntax errors
snapshot_or_generated_files: data/community_college_data.csv is pre-generated but checked in; no need to regenerate
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access, can install all packages. Python 3.11 available. No Docker needed for validation.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Must work on Streamlit Community Cloud. Gemini API key optional via sidebar or secrets.
key_patterns: 1. Each page is in pages/ with numeric prefix for ordering. 2. st.set_page_config() must be FIRST streamlit call in each page. 3. Utils are in utils/ package. 4. Visualizations use Plotly via utils/visualizations.py with consistent _apply_layout pattern. 5. Session state used for df (built-in) and uploaded_df (user uploaded). 6. AI uses google-generativeai with fallback to rule-based. 7. Dark theme configured in .streamlit/config.toml. 8. All charts use CHART_TEMPLATE='plotly_dark' and COLOR_SEQUENCE=Set2.
directory_structure: Root: app.py (entry), requirements.txt, .streamlit/config.toml. pages/: numbered page files (1-4 currently). utils/: data_generator.py, visualizations.py, ai_insights.py. data/: community_college_data.csv.
